'''Yotts Orren''' was a [[Kadas'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kadas'sa'Nikto]] guard who often worked onboard [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba's]] sail barge, [[Khetanna/Legends|''Khetanna'']]. During the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]], he rode on the second [[Bantha-II cargo skiff/Legends|Bantha-II cargo skiff]].

==Biography==
Orren was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. He sometimes stole weapons from [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]. Few trusted him. He was known to wear a gray [[Jumpsuit/Legends|jumpsuit]] and green helmet.

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] Orren was aboard the second [[Bantha-II cargo skiff/Legends|''Bantha-II'' cargo skiff]] piloted by [[Pote Snitkin/Legends|Pote Snitkin]] during the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon|battle]] that broke out when [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] tried to execute his prisoners, the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]], over the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]]. Orren was among the many killed by the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] during the battle.

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Yotts Orren is the name of the "Klaatu in skiff guard outfit" from the vintage action figure line.|Leland Chee's original claim|<ref name="holocron29">{{Blog|holocron|29/comments|Mistaken Identities}}</ref>}}
Yotts Orren appears as a [[Kadas'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kadas'sa'Nikto]] aboard the second [[Bantha-II cargo skiff/Legends|Bantha-II cargo skiff]] during the skirmish at Carkoon in [[1983]]'s [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]. He was portrayed by an uncredited extra. In [[1998]]'s ''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' CD-ROM, Orren's image is used when the player is asked to identify a Kadas'sa'Nikto. In [[2001]], Orren was given a name and brief backstory on a card for the ''[[Tatooine Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]]. Decipher, however, erroneously used the image of another [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] named [[Klaatu/Legends|Klaatu]].

Originally, [[Leland Chee]] had identified the [[Kenner Products|Kenner]] "Klaatu in skiff guard outfit" action figure as Yotts Orren, on his now defunct ''Keeper of the Holocron's Blog''.<ref name="holocron29" /> This character, dressed in white coveralls, only appeared on the top deck of the ''Khetanna'' during ''Return of the Jedi''.

On [[July 6]], [[2011]], Leland Chee [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]] Orren's identity to be the previously unnamed green-hooded Nikto guard aboard the second skiff, on his revived "Keeper of the Holocron" blog on Facebook.<ref name="KOTC">{{Facebook|noprofile=1|name=Leland Chee|url=permalink.php?story_fbid=232130050141262&id=793375187#!/permalink.php?story_fbid=231138123573788&id=1152097426|nobackup=1}}</ref>

Ultimately, this means that [[Klaatu]] is now the "Klaatu in skiff guard outfit" aboard the [[Khetanna/Legends|''Khetanna'']], and, therefore, the popular conjecture that "Klaatu, Barada, Nikto" are together on the second skiff has been debunked.
